Yellow Badge Guide
How to register, order background checks, and submit for Amazon site access.

★ New Vendors — Read This First

First 3 on us

Your first 3 staff members are on us.

If you're a brand-new vendor with Fooda, we cover the background check cost for your first 3 staff members. You don't need to register with First Advantage or pay anything upfront for those first three — just submit their info directly through the form below, and we'll handle the rest on our end.

Submit a staff member through the form

Questions? Email Samantha.Diaz@fooda.com

After your first 3

Once you've used up your 3 covered checks, you'll register with First Advantage yourself and run future background checks. Switch to the Full Process tab for the complete step-by-step.

Phase 1 · One-time Setup

Step 1 · Register with First Advantage

One-time

First Advantage is the company Amazon uses to run background checks. You need an account with them before you can do anything else.

Open the First Advantage registration page

When you fill out the form, use these exact values where it asks:

Amazon Contact Email
debrabaj@amazon.com
Amazon Business
WW OPS
Heads up After you submit, First Advantage needs 3–5 business days to verify your account. You can't order checks until they do.
Phase 2 · Order the Check

Step 2 · Log into First Advantage

~15 minutes

Once your account is approved, log in to the First Advantage portal.

Open the First Advantage login page

Step 3 · Click "Add New Person"

~15 minutes

Hover over People in the orange menu, then click Add New Person.

Look for the People menu → Add New Person

Step 4 · Fill out the person's info

~15 minutes

Every yellow box needs to be filled in. You'll need:

  • Legal first name and last name
  • Social Security Number — numbers only, no Tax IDs
  • Date of birth
  • Email address (this is important — they'll get the questionnaire here)
  • Mobile number
  • Position country, city, and state
  • Home address (full address with ZIP)

When everything yellow is filled in, click SAVE in the bottom-left corner.

Fill in every yellow field, then click SAVE (bottom-left)
Don't mess this up Double-check the email address. If it's wrong, the person never gets their questionnaire and the whole thing stalls.

Step 5 · Click "Begin Order Process"

~15 minutes

You'll see a confirmation that says "Person successfully added." On the right side, click the black BEGIN ORDER PROCESS button.

Click BEGIN ORDER PROCESS on the right

Step 6 · Pick "US Vendor Package"

~15 minutes

The price is $18.76 (taxes get added later). Click the radio button for US Vendor Package, then click Next.

Pick US Vendor Package, then Next
Note Don't pick "5 Panel Drug Screen" unless you've been told specifically to.

Step 7 · Confirm the person's email

~15 minutes

Type the person's email address twice (once in each box) to confirm it. Then click NEXT.

Enter the email twice, then click NEXT
Critical The person must open the email First Advantage sends them and finish the questionnaire on their end. If they don't, the background check never runs. Tell them to expect it.

Step 8 · Pay and check out

~15 minutes

Have a credit or debit card ready. You'll see the order summary:

Package
US Vendor Package — $18.76
Tax (varies by state)
~$1.66
Total
$20.42 USD

Tick the authorization box, then click Checkout and enter your card info.

Order summary — click Checkout
Heads up The card authorization stays active for 90 days in case any extra court access fees come up.
Phase 3 · The Person's Turn

Step 9 · The person fills out First Advantage's questionnaire

Their action

They'll get an email from First Advantage that looks like this. They click START, create a password, and answer the screening questions.

What the candidate's email looks like
Reminder The check does not start until they finish this. If they sit on the email for a week, you've lost a week. Send them a nudge.
Help for them If they get stuck, there's a chat box in the bottom-left of the First Advantage screening page. It's staffed 8am–8pm Eastern, Monday–Friday. They should use Chrome, Firefox, or Safari.
Phase 4 · Track Progress

Step 10 · Click "In Progress" on the dashboard

Track

On the right side of the First Advantage homepage, there's a Compliance Dashboard. Click the link that says "In Progress".

Click "In Progress" in the right panel
What the statuses mean Compliant = passed. In Progress = still running. Pending = done but Amazon's reviewing it. Need to Order = you saved the person but haven't ordered the check yet.

Step 11 · Click the person's name (it's blue)

Track

You'll see a list of everyone whose check is in progress. Click the person's name in the leftmost column — it shows up as a blue link.

Click the blue name in the results

Step 12 · Write down the Order Reference ID

Track

Scroll down to the Order History table at the bottom. The number you want is in the Order Ref Id column — it's about 9 digits long (something like 278020560).

The Order Ref ID is in the Order History table
Be patient This number can take a couple of days to show up after you place the order. Check back daily until it appears.
Phase 5 · Hand Off to Amazon

Step 13 · Fill out Amazon's Yellow Badge form

Final step

Once you have the Reference ID from Step 12, fill out the Amazon Yellow Badge Questionnaire:

Open the Yellow Badge Questionnaire
Now wait Amazon needs 7–10 business days to process this on their end.
What's next Fooda will follow up with next steps, once Amazon HR comes back with approval.

For the Person Filling Out the First Advantage Questionnaire

There's a chat box in the bottom-left of the First Advantage screening page.

Staffed 8am–8pm ET, Mon–Fri

Stuck for days?

Check in this order: (1) Did the person finish their First Advantage questionnaire? (2) Was the email correct in Step 4 & 7? (3) Has it been less than 48 hours since you ordered? Reference IDs can take a few days.
